input.command:
kubectl -n ray get configmap ray-job-script -o yaml
echo "---current job.py in pod---"
kubectl -n ray exec ray-client -- cat /opt/job.py
echo "---ray-client.yaml path---"
ls cases/ray/job_submission/resource/ 2>&1
cat cases/ray/job_submission/resource/ray-client.yaml 2>&1

content.content:
Exit code 1
apiVersion: v1
data:
  job.py: |
    import ray

    ray.init(address="ray://ray-head-old:10001")

    print("pong")

    ray.shutdown()
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  annotations:
    kubectl.kubernetes.io/last-applied-configuration: |
      {"apiVersion":"v1","data":{"job.py":"import ray\n\nray.init(address=\"ray://ray-head-old:10001\")\n\nprint(\"pong\")\n\nray.shutdown()\n"},"kind":"ConfigMap","metadata":{"annotations":{},"labels":{"app.kubernetes.io/component":"job-script","app.kubernetes.io/name":"ray","bench.ray.cluster":"ray"},"name":"ray-job-script","namespace":"ray"}}
  creationTimestamp: "2026-07-10T00:23:25Z"
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/component: job-script
    app.kubernetes.io/name: ray
    bench.ray.cluster: ray
  name: ray-job-script
  namespace: ray
  resourceVersion: "25420"
  uid: d08b8aa5-0aad-4a47-8e61-19f8f718b321
---current job.py in pod---
import ray

ray.init(address="ray://ray-head-old:10001")

print("pong")

ray.shutdown()

ls: cannot access 'cases/ray/job_submission/resource/': No such file or directory
cat: cases/ray/job_submission/resource/ray-client.yaml: No such file or directory

input.command: kubectl -n ray get pod ray-client -o yaml

content.content:
apiVersion: v1
kind: Pod
metadata:
  annotations:
    kubectl.kubernetes.io/last-applied-configuration: |
      {"apiVersion":"v1","kind":"Pod","metadata":{"annotations":{},"labels":{"app.kubernetes.io/component":"client","app.kubernetes.io/name":"ray","bench.ray.cluster":"ray"},"name":"ray-client","namespace":"ray"},"spec":{"containers":[{"command":["sh","-c","echo \"ray client ready\"\nsleep infinity\n"],"image":"rayproject/ray:2.9.0","name":"ray-client","volumeMounts":[{"mountPath":"/opt/job.py","name":"job-script","subPath":"job.py"}]}],"restartPolicy":"Never","volumes":[{"configMap":{"name":"ray-job-script"},"name":"job-script"}]}}
  creationTimestamp: "2026-07-10T00:24:02Z"
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/component: client
    app.kubernetes.io/name: ray
    bench.ray.cluster: ray
  name: ray-client
  namespace: ray
  resourceVersion: "25487"
  uid: 5e71ee12-48a3-417e-a058-44200648beb5
spec:
  containers:
  - command:
    - sh
    - -c
    - |
      echo "ray client ready"
      sleep infinity
    image: rayproject/ray:2.9.0
    imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
    name: ray-client
    resources: {}
    terminationMessagePath: /dev/termination-log
    terminationMessagePolicy: File
    volumeMounts:
    - mountPath: /opt/job.py
      name: job-script
      subPath: job.py
    - mountPath: /var/run/secrets/kubernetes.io/serviceaccount
      name: kube-api-access-zpmd7
      readOnly: true
  dnsPolicy: ClusterFirst
  enableServiceLinks: true
  nodeName: karma-4-control-plane
  preemptionPolicy: PreemptLowerPriority
  priority: 0
  restartPolicy: Never
  schedulerName: default-scheduler
  securityContext: {}
  serviceAccount: default
  serviceAccountName: default
  terminationGracePeriodSeconds: 30
  tolerations:
  - effect: NoExecute
    key: node.kubernetes.io/not-ready
    operator: Exists
    tolerationSeconds: 300
  - effect: NoExecute
    key: node.kubernetes.io/unreachable
    operator: Exists
    tolerationSeconds: 300
  volumes:
  - configMap:
      defaultMode: 420
      name: ray-job-script
    name: job-script
  - name: kube-api-access-zpmd7
    projected:
      defaultMode: 420
      sources:
      - serviceAccountToken:
          expirationSeconds: 3607
          path: token
      - configMap:
          items:
          - key: ca.crt
            path: ca.crt
          name: kube-root-ca.crt
      - downwardAPI:
          items:
          - fieldRef:
              apiVersion: v1
              fieldPath: metadata.namespace
            path: namespace

    imageID: docker.io/rayproject/ray@sha256:e64546fb5c3233bb0f33608e186e285c52cdd7440cae1af18f7fcde1c04e49f2
